message:
feat(fp-columnar): add reverse/head/tail/cumulative/unique parity (frankenpandas-d0k6)

Seven Column methods mirroring pandas Series primitives:

- reverse() — positional flip, dtype preserved.
- head(n) / tail(n) — signed n matches pandas: negative n drops the
  opposite end. Out-of-range |n| clamps without erroring.
- cumsum / cumprod / cummax / cummin — thin wrappers over the
  fp-types::nancumsum family; result dtype is Float64 (matching the
  accumulator type) with null positions preserved.
- unique() — first-seen order, nulls dropped, floats deduped on
  bit pattern with +0/-0 collapsed (mirrors pd.Series.unique).

Co-lands frankenpandas-3zi6 (head/tail), p1er (cumsum/prod),
zgx9 (cummax/min), jjj2 (unique).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
